pageContext.name: Scooby-Doo & Shaggy
pageContext.description: Ruh-roh Raggy!   Get your hands on a highly-detailed, beautifully handpainted Scooby-Doo and Shaggy Rogers collectible statue from MG Collectibles. This delicately crafted statue features your two favorite characters! Perfect for any Scooby-Doo fan or serious collector. This statue stands at one-sixth scale for a perfect display height and size.   Don't miss your chance to own Scooby-Doo and Shaggy to build your own Mystery Inc. scene!
